2604.15448.title: Transfer Learning from Foundational Optimization Embeddings to Unsupervised SAT Representations
2604.15448.paper_summary: Foundational optimization embeddings have recently emerged as powerful pre-trained representations for mixed-integer programming (MIP) problems. These embeddings were shown to enable cross-domain transfer and reduce reliance on solver-generated labels. In this work, we investigate whether such representations generalize beyond optimization to decision problems, focusing on Boolean satisfiability (SAT). We adapt the foundational optimization architecture to SAT by mapping CNF formulas into the same bipartite constraint-variable graph representation used for MIPs. This allows direct reuse of the pre-trained embedding model without architectural changes or supervised fine-tuning. Our results show that these embeddings capture structural regularities in SAT instances and support unsupervised tasks such as instance clustering and distribution identification. We demonstrate, for the first time, that foundational optimization embeddings can transfer to constraint satisfaction domains. Our findings is a step toward a unified representational framework for both optimization and decision problems.
2604.15448.paper_summary_zh: 基礎優化嵌入最近已成為混合整數規劃（MIP）問題的強大預訓練表示。這些嵌入被證明能夠實現跨領域轉移，並減少對求解器生成標籤的依賴。在本研究中，我們探討這些表示是否能超越優化問題，應用於決策問題，重點關注布爾可滿足性（SAT）。我們通過將CNF公式映射到與MIP相同的二部約束-變數圖表示，將基礎優化架構適應於SAT。這使得在不改變架構或進行監督微調的情況下，能夠直接重用預訓練的嵌入模型。我們的結果顯示，這些嵌入捕捉了SAT實例中的結構規律，並支持無監督任務，如實例聚類和分佈識別。我們首次證明基礎優化嵌入可以轉移到約束滿足領域。我們的發現是邁向優化和決策問題統一表示框架的一步。
2604.15448.author: Koyena Pal et.al.
